discussion_comments.comment_body: This isn't something we should be faking. As I understand it, this test suite is intended to validate how `attachContentWidgetEvents` interacts with both the monaco editor and the description DOM element. If either of those change, `attachContentWidgetEvents` could break, but the tests would not.

i have added new implemnetation for this where i Keep the curriculum-data mock, but define initialize as a plain vi.fn inline. This keeps the hook isolated from singleton side effects and avoids an extra named mock variable.
